---
title: "Tahmid's blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Hi, I am Tahmid Hossain Bhuiyan and welcome to my world. 

This is where I digitally live. 

If you have any questions about these projects or my "About" section can't answer, my Linkedin or Email is one click away!
